name: @soltrade/storage
description: Pure storage kernel (ADR-0001 Phase 4A): repository interfaces + record mappers + injected adapters (memory / injected-JSON / injected-SQL shape / injected event-writer). No db drivers, no node:fs — all mechanisms are injected (DI) per docs/architecture/package-boundaries.md. Foundation for Phase 4B Postgres/Redis/ClickHouse wiring.
